items_data.title: Can I Use Cine Vision V4 on Windows and Mac?

detail.text: Cine Vision V4 isn't the first of its kind application as we have seen the success of its previous versions, namely, Cine Vision V3. It is an entertainment platform where you can discover and watch your favorite movies and series subbed and dubbed in Portuguese. Currently, it is available only for Android os and you can install the Android version on handheld devices via Google Play. If you want to make use of the big screens of PCs or Laptops to watch your favorite movies, note that the process is slightly different from handheld devices. Given PCs/Laptops are powered by Windows and OS X systems and there isn't any PC exclusive version of the app, you cannot install it directly, as you would on a handheld device. An easy way around would be to use the same Android version of the Cine Vision V4 app and run it on big screens via Android Emulators. The idea behind Emulators is to set up an Android platform on Windows and OS X systems and use it to run Android apps on PC and Laptop. Think of an Emulator as a virtual machine that sits there on your device and when launched, emulates the Android OS that you can use to run Cine Vision V4. In simple words, with an Emulator set, you can use Cine Vision V4 on PC or Laptop to stream your favorite movies on big screens. Here's how you can install and set up the emulator yourself
